subcodes.first_line: O Ghaffar! When thou hast attained unto the Tablet of thy Chosen Lord, arise and say: "My God, my God! I bear witness that Thou hast manifested Thyself and revealed that which..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غفار اذا فزت بلوح ربک المختار قم و قل الهی الهی اشهد انک ظهرت و اظهرت ما
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
